reasoning: The control requires denying all network communications by default and allowing traffic only by exception. In Kubernetes, this is achieved using NetworkPolicies. By setting a default deny policy for both ingress and egress traffic, we ensure that no traffic is allowed unless explicitly permitted by additional NetworkPolicies.
title: 3_13_6: 3.13.6 Deny network communications traffic by default and allow network communications traffic by exception (i.e., deny all, permit by exception)
